code: import React from'react';import'./Projects.css';import{SlideTransition}from'./PageTransition';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Projects=()=>{const projects=[{title:'E-Commerce Platform',description:'A full-stack e-commerce platform built with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
